description:
PyCalc: A Simple and Lightweight Calculator. Made in Python!



This is the Seventh Release of PyCalc!

Changes :

- [ MAIN UPDATE! ] : Overhauled the a Windows Installer with Foreign Language Support, a Version Number [ Winget Fix ] and other Installer related Stuff!
- Fixes in Padding.
- Larger Logo for Better Visibility.

Installing PyCalc from Winget :

`winget install Chill-Astro.PyCalc`

Installation and Requirements :

- Any system with Python installed.
- Requires Requests package to be installed via pip for PyCalc v1.2 and Higher!
- No installation needed if using PyCalc.exe on Windows Systems or PyCalc file on Linux Systems!

Source code is given as a .zip file. Feel free to make Forks and expand its capabilities!

[ NOTE ] : This Project was made by a Student only for fun. It's not commercial in anyway.
